allSegments.type:
Partial<{
  year: boolean
  month: boolean
  day: boolean
  hour: boolean
  minute: boolean
  second: boolean
  dayPeriod: boolean
  era: boolean
  literal: boolean
  timeZoneName: boolean
  weekday: boolean
  unknown: boolean
  fractionalSecond: boolean
}>
allSegments.description: The computed segments map for the formatter.

createCalendar.description: Function that creates a calendar object for a calendar identifier.

defaultPlaceholderValue.description: The initial placeholder date when uncontrolled.

defaultValue.description: The initial selected date(s) when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the date input is disabled.

focusChange.description: Emits when the focused segment changes.

form.description: The associated form of the hidden input.

format.description: The format function for converting a DateValue to a string.

granularity.description: The smallest unit displayed in the date input.

hourCycle.description: Whether to use 12-hour or 24-hour time format.

id.description: The unique identifier of the date input.

ids.type:
Partial<{
    root: string
    label: (index: number) => string
    control: string
    segmentGroup: (index: number) => string
    hiddenInput: (index: number) => string
  }>
ids.description: The ids of the date input elements. Useful for composition.

invalid.description: Whether the date input is invalid.

isDateUnavailable.description: Returns whether a date is unavailable.

locale.description: The locale used to format date segments.

max.description: The maximum date that can be selected.

min.description: The minimum date that can be selected.

name.description: The name attribute of the hidden input.

placeholderChange.description: Emits when the placeholder date changes.

readOnly.description: Whether the date input is read-only.

required.description: Whether the date input is required.

shouldForceLeadingZeros.description: Whether to always show leading zeros in numeric fields.

timeZone.description: The time zone used to format date segments.

translations.description: The localized strings for the date input.

valueDetailsChange.description: Emits details when the selected value changes.

value.description: The date input machine returned by useDateInput().

index.description: The range index for the label.
The range index for this segment group.
The range index for the hidden input.
